form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd in a small field at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 2 len behind Marines Cry with 57.5kg at $6.50. Before that 9th of 12 at Bunbury Westspeed Plat on March 7 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Fantaxtic carrying 56kg at $61. Faces a tough assignment this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation 12th of 14 at Ascot Grad Hcp 60+ November 22 over 1600m, 10 len behind Westbound with 54.5kg at $101.
